summary: Iteration 63 - Verified fix for seed-question-pool endpoint. All Auto-Pilot and Match Auto-Engine features now working correctly. Backend: seed-question-pool returns seeded=94 questions. Frontend: All UI elements functional - Auto-Pilot toggle (START/STOP), Match Auto-Engine buttons, per-match 'Auto 5 Templates' button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified the fix for seed-question-pool endpoint. The generate_expanded_pool() function was implemented and now returns 94 unique bilingual questions. All Auto-Pilot and Match Auto-Engine features are working correctly.

backend_apis.auto_templates_all: PASSED - POST /api/admin/auto-templates-all returns {processed: 50, results: [...]} (all matches already have 5 templates)
backend_apis.autopilot_status: PASSED - GET /api/admin/autopilot/status returns {running, run_count, last_run, recent_log}

frontend_ui.admin_dashboard: PASSED - Shows SUPER ADMIN header, 1 LIVE MATCH, Quick Resolve, Auto-Pilot, Match Auto-Engine sections
frontend_ui.auto_pilot_section: PASSED - Shows 'Auto-Pilot' with 'Stopped — Manual Mode' status and START button
frontend_ui.auto_pilot_toggle: PASSED - Clicking START changes to STOP with 'Running (Cycle #N)' status, clicking STOP returns to START
frontend_ui.match_auto_engine: PASSED - Shows 'Match Auto-Engine' with 3 buttons: Seed 200 Qs, Auto Templates, 24h Contests
frontend_ui.matches_tab: PASSED - Shows Sync IPL button, Matches/Contests sub-tabs, LIVE/UPCOMING sections with 51 match cards
frontend_ui.per_match_auto_templates: PASSED - 'Auto 5 Templates' button visible on expanded match cards (data-testid='match-auto-templates-{id}')
frontend_ui.match_actions: PASSED - Make Unlive, Add Contest (0/5), Auto 5 Templates buttons visible on expanded LIVE match
